news.headline: Memecoin Airdrop: 33 BNB for Top Memecoins, given to BNB and CAKE holders from Dec 12-19, 2024. (Read More)
news.summary: BNB Chain has introduced a Memecoin Daily Airdrop Series, involving the purchase of 33 BNB worth of leading memecoins for distribution to BNB and CAKE holders. The airdrop event is scheduled to take place from December 12 to December 19, 2024.

news.headline: SL Green partners with Canadian investor, secures $250M commitment for Debt Fund, largest office landlord in Manhattan.
news.summary: In New York on December 5th, 2024, SL Green Realty Corp., the biggest office landlord in Manhattan, disclosed that a Canadian institutional investor will be the main investor in the SLG Opportunistic Debt Fund by providing a commitment of $250.0 million. This investor is recognized as one of the largest globally, overseeing public and parapublic pension plans alongside insurance programs.

news.headline: Columbia Financial, Inc. announces balance sheet repositioning.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Fair Lawn, New Jersey, Columbia Financial, Inc. revealed a strategic move regarding its balance sheet. Known as the holding company for Columbia Bank, the company (NASDAQ: CLBK) undertook this repositioning.

news.headline: ZenaTech acquires US land survey company, aims for industry disruption with drones for speed and accuracy. Acquisition part of larger strategic move.
news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a tech company focusing on AI drone solutions and enterprise SaaS, disclosed today that it has penned a Letter of Intent to purchase its inaugural land survey firm as part of its broader strategy to revolutionize the industry by leveraging drones for speed, precision, and innovation advantages. The deal, inked with a US-based company, marks the foundation of ZenaTech's Drone-as-a-Service business in the Southeast US region. The company's stocks trade on Nasdaq under ZENA and on FSE under 49Q.

news.headline: Southwest Airlines sees stock rise after increasing guidance due to high demand for travel.
Virtune changes underlying asset for Virtune Polygon ETP from MATIC to POL due to Polygon upgrade.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Stockholm, Virtune revealed that after Polygon's upgrade to bolster its native token's functionality and back an expanding chain of blockchains, Polygon (MATIC) will be substituted by Polygon Ecosystem Token (POL) as the fundamental cryptocurrency for Virtune Polygon ETP. This alteration affects the Virtune Polygon ETP with the ISIN code SE0021630217 and ticker name VIRPOLY.

news.headline: UAE to begin oil output increase from April 2025 - Source.
ICL's President and CEO Raviv Zoller to depart in early 2025 after seven years, to be replaced; shared in letter to employees.
news.summary: ICL (NYSE: ICL) (TASE: ICL), a prominent global specialty minerals company based in Tel Aviv, Israel, has disclosed that Raviv Zoller, the current President and CEO for the last seven years, is set to depart from the company in early 2025. Zoller's exit will occur after the selection of a successor and a structured handover process. In a message addressed to the staff, Zoller expressed his emotions, stating, “With a mix of pride and sadness, I share the news of my forthcoming retirement from the role of President and CEO at ICL."

news.headline: Kubota partners with American Rally Association; Sponsorship starts Feb. 7 at Sno*Drift Rally.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Grapevine, Texas, Kubota Tractor Corporation revealed a one-year collaboration to serve as the presenting sponsor for the American Rally Association National Championship. The championship will commence on February 7 at the Sno*Drift Rally. This partnership marks a significant step in the rally world, with Kubota's involvement boosting the event's visibility and impact. Stay tuned for thrilling rallies and competitions throughout the championship, as top drivers compete for the title in this exciting motorsport series.

news.headline: RallyForward™ signs multiyear agreement with USAC for promoting America's largest rally series, led by Vermont SportsCar founder Lance Smith.
news.summary: A new organization called RallyForward™ has secured a multiyear agreement with USAC for promotional rights to America's largest high performance rally series. The initiative is spearheaded by Lance Smith, the founder of Vermont SportsCar, with a focus on enhancing and expanding the sport of stage rally across the country. As part of the agreement, Kubota Tractor Corporation will play a key role in the partnership.

news.headline: Poll: ECB are to cut the deposit rate to 2.00% or lower by end-2025, said 51 of 67 economists (43 of 63 in November)
ICON's survey of biopharma professionals shows sustained investment in AI, digital R&D innovation, but adoption remains siloed.
news.summary: Dublin-based company ICON has released findings from a recent worldwide survey involving biopharmaceutical experts regarding the incorporation of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and digital advancements in clinical research.

news.headline: Poll: ECB are to cut the deposit rate by 25 bps in December to 3.00%, said 73 of 75 economists. Two said 50 bps.
Having foundational reading skills early on is crucial for student success, as it leads to academic achievement.
news.summary: In Grand Rapids, Michigan, on December 5, 2024, it was highlighted that early teaching of foundational reading skills significantly impacts students' success. While a passion for reading is beneficial, it does not ensure academic excellence. Having essential skills is crucial for students to thrive.

news.headline: The OPEC+ meeting is still ongoing, the final agreement is not out yet. There were a lot of discussions around the importance of compliance to the pact - Source
Botnen Consulting AS, controlled by Kristian Botnen, bought 4,210 shares in AKVA group ASA at NOK 71.25 each.
news.summary: Today, Botnen Consulting AS, a company overseen by COO Sea Based Nordic and primary insider Kristian Botnen, purchased 4,210 shares in AKVA group ASA at a cost of NOK 71.25 per share.

news.headline: OPEC+ oil output quotas for all nations are extended for 2026 - IFX cites sources
88% of crypto investors regret missed gains, and 63% admit emotions hurt their portfolio, says survey.
news.summary: According to a recent survey, it was found that 63% of digital asset holders admitted that emotional decisions had a major negative impact on their portfolio.

news.headline: Core Scientific (Nasdaq: CORZ) reports November 2024 updates: 314 self-mined Bitcoin, 29 hosting Bitcoin earned, average 10.5 self-mined Bitcoin/day.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Core Scientific, Inc. (Nasdaq: CORZ) provided unaudited updates on its production and operations for November 2024. The key metrics include:- Self-mining Bitcoin earned: 314 in November compared to 369 in October- Hosting Bitcoin earned by customers: 29 in November down from 52 in October- Average self-mined Bitcoin earned per day: 10.5 in November and 11.9 in October- Self-mining energized hash rate: 1 (exact unit not provided)

news.headline: Purple Biotech closed a $2.8 million direct offering of 472,668 ADSs at $6.00 per ADS.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Purple Biotech Ltd. completed a registered direct offering of 472,668 of its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) on the NASDAQ/TASE under the symbol PPBT. Each ADS, equivalent to 200 ordinary shares, was sold at $6.00 per ADS. Purple Biotech is a clinical-stage company focused on developing innovative therapies to address tumor immune evasion and drug resistance.

news.headline: OPEC+ decides to extend the collective group cut of 2 million bpd by 1 year until the end of 2026 - Delegates
Marketers use multiple channels to engage customers during Cyber Week; Bloomreach reports a 9% increase in Black Friday revenue for 2024.
news.summary: Bloomreach, a technology company based in Mountain View, California, shared insights from the 2024 peak holiday shopping season. According to the company's data, their customers experienced a 9% growth in Black Friday revenue compared to the previous year. Despite the continued importance of email as the primary marketing channel, the key takeaway from this peak season was the significance of personalized marketing strategies that integrate across all consumer touchpoints. This highlights the increasing importance of personalized shopping experiences in driving revenue growth during key shopping periods.

news.headline: Veritone (NASDAQ: VERI) AI services now on AWS Marketplace for easy adoption; access, purchase, and deploy AI solutions.
news.summary: Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI), a prominent developer of human-centric AI technology, revealed that its Artificial Intelligence Solutions Group (AISG) products can now be accessed on the AWS Marketplace. This curated platform aids businesses of diverse scales in discovering, testing, procuring, implementing, and overseeing solutions from AWS Partners. Veritone's inclusion in the AWS Marketplace paves the way for enterprises to easily embrace AI by accessing, buying, and rolling out Veritone's acclaimed offerings.

news.headline: WiSA Technologies, Inc. urges stockholders to vote at 2024 Annual Meeting on Dec 20, for IP assets acquisition from Data Vault Holdings, Inc. via proxy.
news.summary: WiSA Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: WISA) based in Beaverton, Oregon, has entered a definitive agreement to acquire AI, blockchain, and Data Web 3.0 IP assets from Data Vault Holdings, Inc. This acquisition aims to establish a data technology and licensing company that will utilize intellectual property and proprietary HPC software. The company has issued a Definitive Proxy Statement for its 2024 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, scheduled for December 20, 2024. This meeting will cover detailed plans for the transaction.

news.headline: Power Nickel Inc. shareholders approve spin-out of Golden Ivan Property and Chilean assets. TSXV: PNPN, OTCBB: PNPNF, Frankfurt: IVV.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 5, 2024, Power Nickel Inc. has received approval from its shareholders for the proposed plan of arrangement. The company, trading under the tickers TSXV: PNPN, OTCBB: PNPNF, and Frankfurt: IVV, is progressing with the arrangement following the shareholder consent.

news.headline: Precision Diagnostics introduces VerifID, redefining sample authentication in drug testing with innovative solution.
news.summary: Precision Diagnostics, a prominent player in cutting-edge diagnostic solutions, reveals the launch of VerifID on December 5, 2024. This pioneering solution sets a new standard for sample authentication in drug testing. VerifID streamlines the process and introduces a fresh approach, eliminating previous hurdles in the industry.

news.headline: Poll: Canadian Dollar is forecasted to gain 0.4% to 1.4020/USD in 12 months (vs 1.32 in November poll)
Poll: Canadian dollar forecasted to edge 0.3% higher to 1.4034/USD in 3 months (vs 1.36 in November poll)
US labor market resilience dampened as unemployment duration increases.
OPEC+ has agreed to keep oil output at the current level for Q1 - IFX citing sources
Barry Sanders becomes part-owner of El Car Wash in Michigan amid expansion. Florida's largest express car wash.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, El Car Wash, the largest express car wash company in Florida, disclosed that former NFL Hall of Famer Barry Sanders has acquired an ownership interest in the company. Sanders, renowned for his exceptional career as one of the greatest running backs in NFL history, is now a part-owner of the company. This move signifies a significant development for El Car Wash and highlights Sanders' foray into the business world.

news.headline: Industry veteran Ray Kaczmarek joins Nanoscope Therapeutics as Chief Technical and Manufacturing Officer in gene therapy development. Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: Nanoscope Therapeutics Inc., a biotechnology company in its late-stage clinical development, focusing on gene therapies for inherited retinal diseases and geographic atrophy (GA), revealed on December 5, 2024, that Ray Kaczmarek has been appointed as the Chief Technology Officer.

news.headline: Global volunteer management software company Better Impact acquired by The Brydon Group, serving thousands of organizations.
news.summary: In a recent development on December 5, 2024, in Winston Salem, North Carolina, and Hamilton, Ontario, Better Impact, a renowned company specializing in volunteer management, scheduling, and engagement software, has disclosed its acquisition by The Brydon Group. With a strong presence globally, Better Impact has established itself as a key player in the industry, serving numerous organizations around the world. The acquisition marks a significant move in the market, consolidating expertise and resources to enhance services for clients.

news.headline: Urano Energy acquires 15 uranium properties in Utah and Colorado. CSE: UE OTCQB: UECXF. Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: Urano Energy Corp., a company listed on the CSE under the ticker UE and on the OTCQB under the ticker UECXF, disclosed on December 5, 2024, that it has successfully finalized the purchase of 15 uranium properties, as detailed in its prior statement.

news.headline: Muna Therapeutics partners with GSK to advance Alzheimer's treatments using MiND-MAP approach. GSK secures option to multiple targets for drug development.
news.summary: Over a period of several years, the use of Muna's comprehensive MiND-MAP spatial multi-omics method has led to the discovery and validation of novel drug targets and treatment pathways for Alzheimer's disease. GSK has acquired the option for a number of established Alzheimer's disease-related targets for further exploration in drug discovery and development.

news.headline: Heidi Durflinger, 20-year tourism expert, named CEO of EF World Journeys USA. Grew adult leisure tour business 3x.Characters: 104
news.summary: Durflinger, who previously held the position of President at EF World Journeys in North America, now oversees the adult leisure tour brands EF Go Ahead, EF Ultimate Break, and EF Adventures. Under his leadership, the customer base of the EF Go Ahead Tours has tripled, indicating a significant growth in the adult leisure tour business.

news.headline: Beard Bros Pharms calls for pardons for federal prisoners like Edwin Rubis for non-violent cannabis crimes, following Hunter Biden's pardon for gun charges and tax evasion by President Biden.
news.summary: On December 1st, 2024, President Biden announced a "Full and Unconditional Pardon" for his son, Hunter Biden, who had been convicted of felony gun charges and tax evasion in September 2024. This decision comes after much public attention and controversy surrounding the case. President Biden stated, "Enough is enough," emphasizing his support for his son. This pardon has sparked varied reactions across the country.

news.headline: Global nickel hydroxycarbonate market is estimated to reach US$ 902.7 million by 2034 with 5.9% CAGR growth, from US$ 508.8 million in 2024. East Asia expected to hold 23.1% market share in 2034. Significant players include Norilsk Nickel and Umicore. Powder form type to grow at 5.6% CAGR with US$ 125 million opportunity. North America and East Asia to collectively create US$ 192.3 million opportunity.
news.summary: The global nickel hydroxycarbonate market is expected to reach a valuation of US$508.8 million in 2024, with a projected growth rate of 5.9% during the forecast period of 2024 to 2034. Nickel hydroxycarbonate is used in various industries including ceramics, paints, coatings, and as a precursor to catalysts. The construction industry's demand for stainless steel, which requires nickel hydroxycarbonate as a precursor, is driving the market growth. By 2034, the market is expected to reach US$902.7 million, with an opportunity of US$394 million from 2024-2034. East Asia is predicted to hold a market share of 23.1% in 2034. Key players in the market include Norilsk Nickel and Umicore. The powder form type is estimated to grow at a CAGR of 5.6%, generating an absolute $ opportunity of US$125 million between 2024 and 2034. North America and East Asia are expected to create an absolute $ opportunity of US$192.3 million collectively.

news.headline: Ceva-NeuPro-Nano named Best IP/Processor at EE Awards Asia for delivering low power and high performance in AI tasks.
news.summary: Ceva-NeuPro-Nano™ has recently been recognized as the Best IP/Processor of the year for its Smart Edge IP technology. The Ceva-NeuPro-Nano NPUs offer a superior combination of ultra-low power consumption and high performance within a compact design. These NPUs are tailored to effectively handle embedded AI tasks in various sectors such as consumer and industrial industries. This achievement solidifies Ceva's position as a leader in the industry, showcasing their commitment to innovation and excellence.

news.headline: Dunes Point Capital, LP's Roofing Services Solutions acquires Quality First Roofing, LLC in Lecanto, FL.
news.summary: On December 5th, 2024 in Rye, New York, Roofing Services Solutions (RSS), a company owned by Dunes Point Capital, LP (DPC), successfully purchased Quality First Roofing, LLC (QF) based in Lecanto, FL. QF specializes in re-roofing and building exterior services for residential properties, expanding RSS's service capabilities. The acquisition marks a strategic move by RSS to strengthen their market presence and provide enhanced services to their customers.

news.headline: Global meningitis treatment market valued at US$150.9 Mn in 2023, set to reach US$ 234.8 Mn by 2034 with a CAGR of 4.1%. -WG
news.summary: The global meningitis treatment market was valued at US$150.9 million in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.1% to reach US$234.8 million by the end of 2034. This growth is driven by the rise in meningitis cases worldwide and advancements in research and development. Meningitis, an inflammation of the brain and spinal cord membranes, is a significant global health concern, with bacterial meningitis being the most severe form. Key players in the market include Novartis, Pfizer, Merck, and GSK, among others. Factors contributing to market growth include the increase in meningitis cases, advancements in vaccination programs, and enhanced research and development efforts. The market is witnessing a surge in demand for innovative therapeutic options and improved vaccine formulations to prevent and control meningitis.

news.headline: LifeSignals' UbiqVue™ 2A Multiparameter System gains EU MDR Certification for active patient monitoring, replacing manual spot checks with continuous monitoring in hospital and out-of-hospital settings.
news.summary: A new cloud-based system has been developed, incorporating a wearable biosensor that measures SpO2 levels on the chest. This innovative technology allows for active monitoring of patients both inside the hospital and in out-of-hospital care settings. The system eliminates the need for manual spot checks, providing continuous and near real-time monitoring of patients. Utilizing a web-based platform, healthcare professionals can view this data promptly. This advancement streamlines the monitoring process and enhances patient care.

news.headline: Jeff Bezos advocates for a growth-oriented approach to tackle national debt crisis, aiming to boost GDP growth to 3-5% annually.
news.summary: During the New York Times DealBook Summit, Jeff Bezos, the founder of Amazon.com Inc., expressed optimism about addressing America's national debt crisis by emphasizing economic growth rather than spending cuts. Bezos suggested that the key to overcoming economic challenges, such as the deficit and national debt, is through outgrowing them. He proposed increasing GDP growth to 3-5% annually while keeping debt growth at a slower pace, rather than solely focusing on reducing debt. Bezos emphasized the importance of a growth-oriented mindset for the country, stating that it is crucial for progress. This comes at a time when the U.S. economy demonstrated 2.8% growth in the third quarter.

news.headline: Trinity Capital Inc. invests $20M in growth capital to Steno, a tech-enabled legal support provider.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Trinity Capital Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIN), a prominent financial solutions provider to growing companies, disclosed the allocation of $20 million in growth funds to Steno, a tech-centric legal support provider.

news.headline: New Beef. It's What's For Dinner. appetizers for holiday parties - DENVER, Dec. 5, 2024 /PRNewswire - three new recipes to spice up your party.
news.summary: The renowned Beef. It's What's For Dinner. label introduces three fresh appetizers ideal for upcoming holiday gatherings. In Denver on December 5, 2024, the company unveiled these new additions to their menu. Amidst the chilly weather, the prospect of a cocktail soiree featuring savory beef hors d'oeuvres is truly enticing. Embrace the festive spirit as the holiday season thrives...

news.headline: Alibaba International launches AI tool Pic Copilot to aid SMEs in America with design, aiming to cut costs and boost sales.
news.summary: A new AI-driven solution is being introduced in the United States by Alibaba International Digital Commerce Group, with the goal of assisting small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in reducing costs and boosting sales. The solution, known as Pic Copilot, incorporates advanced artificial intelligence technology to support businesses in America. The launch took place in New York on December 5, 2024. This innovative tool has the potential to significantly enhance efficiency and profitability for SMEs by leveraging AI capabilities.

news.headline: Viper Partners assisted in 2 major oral surgery transactions in October 2024, guiding 2 surgeons through the process.
news.summary: In December 5, 2024, in Palm Beach, Florida, Viper Partners, a prominent company specializing in representing dental practices for sale, managed to oversee two significant oral surgery deals in October of the same year. The company provided expert guidance to two well-respected oral surgeons through the process of forming partnerships, allowing them to successfully complete the transactions.

news.headline: 600+ K-12 teachers attend ISS virtual job fair in Princeton, NJ, demonstrating interest in international school jobs.
news.summary: In Princeton, N.J., as of December 5, 2024, over 600 educators have signed up for the initial ISS virtual job fair of the hiring season. This surge in registrations highlights the growing appeal of opportunities in the international school sector for educators looking to secure teaching positions.

news.headline: Bybit offers festive rewards on Bybit P2P with 100,000 USDT prize; world's second-largest crypto exchange.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on December 5, 2024, Bybit, ranked as the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally based on trading volume, has announced its participation in the holiday spirit with a series of rewards on Bybit P2P. The festivities kick off with a Christmas giveaway of 100,000 USDT. This joyful season will bring about...

news.headline: Dye & Durham teams up with Robin AI to launch AI-powered Unity Contract Draft and Review for its customer-base in early 2025.
news.summary: Robin AI and Dye & Durham will introduce the AI-driven Unity Contract Draft and Review in early 2025 and implement it among Dye & Durham's wide customer network. Dye & Durham offers assistance to small law firms globally in tackling intricate legal challenges, either through in-house solutions or collaborations.
